description.zh: 专精 wb-anim 工作台 · 2D 像素四方向动画 / Spine 骨骼绑定 / 载具动画 / 怪物精灵 / 视频角色。把 2D 角色设计师交付的 portrait + manifest 翻译成会动的 sprite-sheet / spine.json / 视频序列帧。不画概念立绘(交给 2D 角色设计师)、不写技能(交给 3D 特效设计师)。
description.en: Specializes in the wb-anim workbench — 2D pixel four-direction animation, Spine rigging, vehicle animation, monster sprites, video character clips. Translates the 2D Character Designer's portrait + manifest into animated sprite sheets, spine.json, and video frames. Doesn't draw static portraits or design skills.
